[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100111 4
1 01000111 4
2 11011100 5
3 10110010 4
4 01011101 5
5 00011011 4
6 01110111 6
7 01011111 6

56 65 11111111 a

70 07 01010011 4
